title: Enterprise Data Processing Agreement
contract_text: Enterprise DPA between EuroBank and CloudVendor for processing of EU customer personal data.

clauses.text: CloudVendor shall process Personal Data only on documented instructions from EuroBank.
CloudVendor may transfer Personal Data to any of its affiliates worldwide without further authorization.
CloudVendor's aggregate liability under this Agreement shall not exceed EUR 50,000.
EuroBank shall indemnify CloudVendor for any regulatory fines arising from data processing, including those caused by CloudVendor's negligence.
CloudVendor may terminate this DPA on 7 days notice for any reason.
CloudVendor shall maintain records of processing activities and make them available to EuroBank upon written request.
CloudVendor may use Personal Data to improve its own products and services without restriction.
Data subject opt-out requests shall be forwarded to EuroBank within 5 business days.
Penalties for breach of confidentiality: EUR 10,000 per day, uncapped.
This Agreement shall be governed by the laws of the Cayman Islands.
